content:
🚀 Now ready to execute Version 8.4. Awaiting final input before moving forward. 🎮📖 Are you fully satisfied with this plan?

📌 Version 8.5 – Leadership Challenges, Archetype Customization, Item Caps, Forced Infection Mechanics, & Counterable Chaos Events


🚀 This iteration finalizes leadership battles, archetype customization, item distribution, forced infection selection, and counterplay for chaos events.

📜 1. Leadership Challenges – One Attempt Per Week with High Stakes

📜 Leadership can only be challenged once per week, and the loser is permanently exiled.

✔ Leadership Challenge Rules:
• Each faction may have one leadership challenge per week.
• If the challenger wins, the leader is dethroned and exiled.
• If the challenger loses, they are exiled instead.
• Once exiled, a player can no longer be in a faction.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 501 (chunk 501/555)
